texto: In honor of Oprah Winfrey: Even greater than the ability to inspire others with hope is the power to motivate them to give as much to the lives of others as they would give to their own
autor: and to empower them to confront the worst in themselves in order to discover and claim the best in themselves.
explicacao: Citação de and to empower them to confront the worst in themselves in order to discover and claim the best in themselves. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “In honor of Oprah Winfrey: Even greater than the ability to inspire others with hope is the power…” articula motivacao, aberjhani, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
